title: New look, too cluttered
excerpt: The new view for Monday updates section, is there a way to remove it? It’s way too cluttered.

posts.author: SamYeager (Sam)
posts.cookedHtml:
The new view for Monday updates section, is there a way to remove it? It’s way too cluttered.

image737×276 22.4 KB

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t know of any way to change the ‘Updates’ tab. Which portion are you saying is cluttered, the box where you type in updates?

posts.author: WLane (Wally Lane)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @SamYeager , I’m not exactly sure what you mean is cluttered. If you mean that it’s a long scroll of updates, you can create a new item card and set it as the default. The AI summarise updates column is great to use too, to summarise the updates. I also widen the width of the window too, so it’s bigger when clicked on.

Here’s an example

image1591×709 78.1 KB

posts.author: SamYeager (Sam)
posts.cookedHtml:
image693×180 7.78 KB

now there is a response section for each update.

Also, with the new update if you hit “reply” it doesn’t automatically do @ the person, but you need to manually do @ and the person. It’s much faster before the update.

posts.author: WLane (Wally Lane)
posts.cookedHtml: Ah I’m with you now, with the response section on each update, it is using a lot of space cumulatively isn’t it. I hadn’t even noticed that the @ name was dropping off when you click reply. Pros and cons to both I suppose, but sounds like it would now be a feature request.

posts.author: SamYeager (Sam)
posts.cookedHtml:
there are two “reply” spots. It’s redundant and makes scrolling up and down through updates looked cluttered or “fatty”. It doesn’t need two spots for “reply” , just the top reply like before the update works great.

Also 2) If I hit “reply” it doesn’t automatically do @ anymore and whoever did the post. Before the update it did, so now there are more steps to reply and tag the person. The update with Monday made things WORSE, not better.

image.png707×821 47.1 KB

Sam

posts.author: TuesdayThroughWednes (josh.bailey@wsrb.com)
posts.cookedHtml: This is spot on Sam, This double reply feature is just clutter. We now have to add a feature request for an addition that clutters up our boards?
